news.headline: BoE's Ramsden: Post-budget gilt repricing is very orderly indeed.

Global venous stents market expected to reach US$ 2.4 Billion by 2034, growing at a 7.2% CAGR. Key players driving growth with innovative solutions - Medtronic plc, Boston Scientific Corporation, among others. Rising incidences of venous disorders contributing to market demand.
news.summary: The global venous stents market was worth around US$1.1 billion in 2023, and is predicted to grow at a rate of 7.2% annually from 2024 to 2034. By the end of this forecast period, the market is expected to exceed US$2.4 billion. This growth is fueled by the rise in venous disorders cases, technological advancements in stent development, and increased awareness of minimally invasive procedures. Venous stents are crucial in treating conditions like DVT, post-thrombotic syndrome, May-Thurner syndrome, Nutcracker syndrome, and for patients with compromised blood flow during hemodialysis. Key industry players include Becton, Dickinson and Company, Bentley InnoMed GmbH, Boston Scientific Corporation, Cook Medical, Medtronic plc, and W. L. Gore & Associates, Inc. Recent innovations from these companies include advanced material coatings and specialized stents for conditions like May-Thurner syndrome. The main drivers of market growth are the growing incidence of venous diseases, particularly chronic DVT and post-thrombotic syndrome.

StickIt Technologies Inc. presents new medical straw for vitamin delivery to all ages, starting research in 2025.
news.summary: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, December 9, 2024 - StickIt Technologies Inc. (referred to as "StickIt") (CSE: STKT), a technology company based in Israel and Canada, has revealed a revolutionary advancement in the form of a medical straw designed to administer vitamins to individuals of all ages. The Company will commence research on this innovation, with the aim of providing a convenient method for delivering essential nutrients.

news.headline: Orna presents data on innovative panCAR™ approach at ASH Annual Meeting.Notable mention: Significant reduction in NHP B cells, sustained depletion for 7 days after a single dose.
news.summary: In recent findings, just one dose of Orna's anti-CD20 panCAR™ led to a notable decrease in non-human primate (NHP) B cells. This reduction was sustained even seven days post-administration. What makes this approach distinctive is its ability to provide a temporary and adaptable immune cell therapy, all without requiring lymphodepletion. These results highlight the potential for Orna's treatment to efficiently target and deplete specific cells in primates, showcasing promising avenues for future immune cell therapies.

news.headline: Newmark secures $1.75B refinancing for Fontainebleau's Florida resorts.leading real estate advisor.New York transaction.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Newmark Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: NMRK), a prominent commercial real estate advisor, disclosed that they successfully facilitated a financial arrangement totaling $1.2 billion. Newmark specializes in catering to major institutional investors, multinational companies, and property owners and tenants.

news.headline: Dr. Shawn Griffin, physician and URAC President/CEO, named in Modern Healthcare's 100 Most Influential People in Healthcare.
news.summary: URAC has recently revealed that Dr. Shawn Griffin, the inaugural physician to hold the position of URAC's President and CEO, has been recognized as one of Modern Healthcare's top 100 Most Influential People in Healthcare. This prestigious acknowledgment highlights individuals who have had a significant impact on the healthcare sector. The event took place on December 9, 2024, in Washington.

news.headline: Asymbl partners with Salesforce Foundations for advanced recruiting capabilities with Asymbl ATS. AUSTIN, Texas, Dec. 9, 2024 - Asymbl, Inc. integrates ATS system for streamlined workflows.
news.summary: Asymbl, Inc. announced today the integration of Asymbl ATS, an advanced Applicant Tracking System, to enhance the recruiting capabilities of talent teams. This integration aims to streamline workflows and boost results. The company is based in Austin, Texas, and the announcement was made on December 9, 2024. This move is set to provide scalable solutions for recruitment processes.

news.headline: Introducing the Cool Calm Cotton Set by Cotton x D.S. & Durga - Limited Edition 100% Cotton Scented Blanket to Calm Nerves. Launching this holiday season.
news.summary: An exclusive collaboration between Cotton Incorporated and D.S. & DURGA has resulted in the release of the Cool Calm Cotton Set, a limited edition 100% cotton scented blanket aimed at calming frayed nerves. This unique blanket is woven with care and designed to bring comfort during the holiday season. Released on December 9, 2024, this special edition item is set to make a lasting impression on consumers.

news.headline: BoE's Ramsden on CNRF: There will be further phases.
Truth Initiative launches "Outsmart Nicotine" campaign to help young adults quit nicotine addiction.
news.summary: A recent nationwide initiative has been launched with the aim of assisting young adults in overcoming nicotine addiction through the use of science-based quitting resources and relatable narratives. As of December 9, 2024, Truth Initiative, the leading nonprofit organization in public health in the country, has introduced this campaign. The initiative provides essential tools and stories to aid young individuals in breaking free from nicotine addiction and has already impacted a significant number of individuals across the nation.

news.headline: Retarus named a Leader in 2024 IDC MarketScape for Worldwide Digital Fax, aiding in organizations' digital transformation.
news.summary: Retarus, a prominent global provider of secure and efficient communication services for essential business operations, has been acknowledged as a Leader in the IDC MarketScape's recent report on Worldwide Digital Fax 2024 Vendor Assessment (doc #US51812124, issued in December 2024). The IDC MarketScape report assists organizations in selecting suitable partners to cater to their crucial digital fax requirements and propel their digital transformation endeavors forward. Retarus Cloud Fax has been highlighted for its exceptional performance in this assessment.

news.headline: AIDS Healthcare Foundation partners with Icertis for contract management across 47 countries, aims to drive savings and compliance.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, Icertis, a leading provider of AI-driven contract intelligence solutions, recently revealed that AIDS Healthcare Foundation (AHF) has chosen their platform to enhance contract management operations in 47 different countries. By leveraging the Icertis platform, AHF aims to enhance operational efficiencies and boost financial performance through enhanced compliance, cost control, and revenue optimization within contracts. These contracts are instrumental in shaping the financial transactions within the organization and serve as valuable resources for making strategic business decisions.

news.headline: PROS earns IDC 2024 CX CPQ Customer Satisfaction Award for highest customer satisfaction scores in CPQ market.
news.summary: In Houston, PROS Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PRO), a prominent provider of AI-driven SaaS pricing and sales solutions, has achieved top placement in IDC's 2024 CX CPQ Customer Satisfaction Award (CSAT). This accolade places PROS in the highest scoring group for vendors in the CPQ application market. The CSAT Awards, based on IDC's CX Path survey, honor leading CX vendors with the highest customer satisfaction scores. This recognition highlights PROS' commitment to customer satisfaction in the competitive market landscape.

news.headline: KNIME releases K-AI, an AI companion to aid in collaboration, answering queries, and building data workflows, improving efficiency.
news.summary: The open source data analytics and AI company KNIME has unveiled its AI companion, K-AI, to all users. This innovative tool allows users to collaboratively create robust data workflows enhanced by AI technology. K-AI can provide answers to queries, offer suggestions, and expand or construct comprehensive data workflows in response to user inputs. By leveraging this AI companion, users can expedite the process of gaining insights while enjoying full visibility and authority over the AI operations. The introduction of K-AI marks a significant advancement in automation within the industry.

news.headline: LRN Corp receives 2 awards for AI innovation, including Best Advance in Generative AI Learning Solutions.
news.summary: A company based in New York, LRN Catalyst, recently launched Engage.AI earlier this year. This innovative product has been acknowledged for its excellence in the category of Generative AI Learning Solutions.

news.headline: OMRON introduces new G5Q-HR power relay for efficiency; G5Q series has sold 500 million units worldwide.
news.summary: In Hoffman Estates, Illinois, OMRON Electronic Components revealed the newest version of its G5Q global standard compact power relay, G5Q-HR. First introduced in 2001, the G5Q series has established itself as a reliable standard in compact power relays, with over 500 million units purchased worldwide. The G5Q-HR showcases innovative elements aimed at boosting performance and prolonging operational lifespan, especially in demanding conditions.

news.headline: Serko (NZX: SKO) to launch NDC content in Zeno with Amadeus by mid-2025, expanding their airline retailing with Amadeus Travel Platform.
news.summary: In Auckland, New Zealand, Serko Ltd. (NZX:SKO), a prominent player in online business travel, has revealed plans to introduce NDC (New Distribution Capability) content in partnership with Amadeus. This move aims to enhance Serko's airline retailing options within the Serko platform. The implementation is scheduled for mid-2025, with the integration of NDC-enabled content into Serko's corporate travel solution, Zeno, via the Amadeus Travel Platform. Through this collaboration, travelers will gain access to NDC offers on Amadeus, which includes corporate-negotiated fares and personalized incentives.

news.headline: TD SYNNEX wins 2024 AWS Partner Award in Geography and Global category.
news.summary: TD SYNNEX, based in FREMONT, Calif., and CLEARWATER, Fla., has been awarded the 2024 Geography and Global AWS Partner Award. This prestigious recognition highlights the company's outstanding partnership with Amazon Web Services (AWS).

news.headline: Skyhigh Security enhances data protection for Microsoft Copilot, catering to safe AI adoption. A market-leading SSE provider and leader in cloud security, they underscore their commitment to secure AI.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Skyhigh Security, a prominent Security Service Edge (SSE) provider specializing in data-focused cloud security solutions, has revealed the enhancement of its specialized data protection features. The company is recognized globally for its cloud, on-premises, and hybrid security solutions. Skyhigh Security announced the extension of its advanced data protection capabilities to safeguard Microsoft Copilot, a rapidly expanding AI solution in the corporate sector. This development showcases the company's dedication to facilitating secure AI integration. It follows a string of strategic initiatives aimed at bolstering their position in the market.

news.headline: Volato Group (NYSE: SOAR) withdraws S-1 statement, aiming for positive Q4 net income in 2024 after improved performance.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Volato Group, Inc. (NYSE American: SOAR), a prominent player in private aviation innovation, has declared the withdrawal of its S-1 registration statement. This move signifies the firm's advancement in bolstering its financial standing, representing a significant achievement in its restructuring endeavors. Progress is steady towards achieving a positive net income in Q4 2024, fueled by strategic measures that have already enhanced financial results.

news.headline: Genasys renews $3.35M maintenance deal for Indian Navy LRAD systems, totaling $13.8M since 2010.
news.summary: In San Diego, Genasys Inc., a leading provider in Protective Communications, revealed a three-year, $3.35 million continuation maintenance deal for LRAD systems utilized by the Indian Navy. This marks the third agreement where Genasys services the Indian Navy's LRADs through local maintenance centers. According to Richard Danforth, the CEO, they have amassed $13.8 million in LRAD maintenance agreements for the Indian Navy since 2010.

news.headline: Lithic introduces Commercial Revolving Credit API for businesses to launch scalable credit card programs with flexibility.
news.summary: A financial technology platform, Lithic, headquartered in New York, has recently unveiled its Commercial Revolving Credit API. This addition to their range of credit solutions is designed to assist businesses in efficiently launching and expanding commercial credit card programs. The API offers unparalleled flexibility and control, allowing card programs to be swiftly implemented and grown. With this new feature, companies can create and manage their commercial credit card programs with ease.

news.headline: Pixxel raises $24M, reaching a total of $60M in Series B funding, totaling $95M raised to date.
news.summary: Pixxel, a space technology company with headquarters in Bengaluru, India, and Los Angeles, has recently secured $24 million in funding for its Series B round. This additional investment boosts the total funding for the Series B round to $60 million. In total, Pixxel has successfully raised $95 million across all funding rounds up to now. The Series B extension round attracted new investors, including M&G Catalyst.

news.headline: Swoop appoints Cameron Hyzer as CFO starting December 2, 2024. He will manage the financial aspects for the company.
news.summary: Swoop, based in New York, has appointed Cameron Hyzer as the new Chief Financial Officer starting December 2, 2024. Hyzer will be responsible for managing the financial strategies of Swoop and leading various finance functions such as planning, analysis, treasury, accounting, reporting, tax, and investor relations. Ron Elwell, Co-Founder of Swoop, expressed enthusiasm about Hyzer's appointment, emphasizing its importance as the company transitions into an independent entity.

news.headline: McAfee appoints Joe Manna as Chief Product and Engineering Officer, effective from Dec 9, 2024, to drive the company's innovation and customer experience.
news.summary: A leading online security company, McAfee, based in San Jose, California, has appointed Joe Manna as their Chief Product and Engineering Officer starting on December 9, 2024. Manna, coming from Experian, will be responsible for overseeing McAfee's engineering and product strategy, with a focus on providing cutting-edge designs that prioritize consumers and ensure smooth customer experiences. The goal is to strengthen McAfee's commitment to establishing a secure digital environment.

news.headline: Coordinated Business Systems in Burnsville, Minn. named a 2024 Elite Dealer, one of America's top office technology dealers.
news.summary: Coordinated Business Systems, based in Burnsville, Minnesota, has been recognized as one of America's leading office technology dealers by being named a 2024 Elite Dealer.

news.headline: Everstream Analytics awarded Top Software & Tech Award for 2024 for Commodity Intelligence solution.
news.summary: Located in San Marcos, California, Everstream Analytics has been recognized with the prestigious Top Software & Tech award for 2021. The company received this honor for its Commodity Intelligence solution, which stood out among competitors in the industry. This acknowledgment highlights Everstream Analytics' commitment to innovation and excellence in the technology sector.

news.headline: Recent vintage borrowers took advantage of early-autumn rate drops with over 300K refinancing in September and October, per ICE Mortgage Monitor.
news.summary: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. disclosed its December 2024 ICE Mortgage Monitor Report, utilizing extensive mortgage, real estate, and public records data sets. The report highlights a significant spike in refinance activity within the mortgage industry following a drop in 30-year conforming mortgage interest rates to around 6% in August/September. This trend is outlined in the report, which provides detailed insights into the market. ICE, a prominent global technology and data provider listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol ICE, continues to offer valuable information through its reports.

news.headline: Fanstake and The Collective Association partner to boost college athletes' NIL opportunities, ensuring transparency and fairness.
news.summary: A collaboration has been announced between Fanstake, the pioneering fan-operated Name, Image & Likeness (NIL) platform in college sports, and The Collective Association (TCA), a prominent advocate for college athletes' NIL rights. This partnership is geared towards empowering athletes and fans by promoting fairness and transparency within the college sports landscape. By joining forces, the two entities seek to create a mutually beneficial environment for all involved parties. This strategic alliance between Fanstake and TCA marks a significant step towards revolutionizing the college sports industry.

news.headline: XRP surges 328% in a month, hitting $2.82 amid Ripple legal wins. XRP outpaces Bitcoin, Ethereum. XRP currently at $2.38 with $136B market cap. Ali Martinez projects price targets of $8.40 and $48.12; predicts potential dip to $2.25.
news.summary: XRP has recently surpassed Bitcoin and Ethereum in performance, reaching $2.82, its highest value in almost seven years, due to positive legal advancements by Ripple. Currently, XRP is priced at $2.38 with a market cap of $136 billion. Despite a -7.15% decrease in the past 24 hours, it shows a 1.5% increase over the week. In contrast, Bitcoin is priced at $98,442.51 with a market cap of $1.94 trillion, experiencing a 1.6% decrease in the last 24 hours but a 3.7% increase over seven days. Ethereum stands at $3,859.76 with a market cap of $465 billion, observing a 3.2% drop in the past day while surging by 7.4% in the week. Renowned crypto trader, Ali Martinez, views XRP as both overbought and undervalued. He notes the breakout from a multi-year symmetrical triangle and sets price targets at $8.40 conservatively and $48.12 optimistically. Martinez foresees a potential dip for XRP to $2.25 in the near term, which he sees as a buying opportunity with the target price of $4.40.

news.headline: Cala Health secures $50M financing round to accelerate growth, co-led by Vertex Growth Fund and Nexus NeuroTech Ventures.
news.summary: In San Mateo, California on December 9, 2024, Cala Health, a pioneering company in non-invasive bioelectronic medicine, revealed the successful initial completion of a highly demanded $50 million growth round. This funding was co-led by Vertex Growth Fund and Nexus NeuroTech Ventures. The investment round was oversubscribed, indicating strong interest and support from investors in the company. This development signals a significant milestone for Cala Health as it continues to advance its innovative approach in the field of bioelectronic medicine.

news.headline: Ethiopian Diaspora Trust Fund (EDTF) broadens mission for transformative growth in Ethiopia by mobilizing resources and global partnerships.
news.summary: In Addis Ababa, Ethiopia, the Ethiopian Diaspora Trust Fund (EDTF) is gaining attention for its efforts to bring about significant change in Ethiopia. Established in 2018, EDTF, a diaspora-driven organization, is focused on mobilizing resources and forming global partnerships to drive innovation and development in the country. Acting as a bridge between U.S. investors and growth opportunities in Africa, EDTF is expanding its mission to create a positive impact. The organization aims to empower the Ethiopian community and has quickly become a prominent player in the country's development landscape.

news.headline: Rent the Runway partners with Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders for empowering campaign on Dec. 9, 2024.  America's Sweethearts featured. (Character count: 119)
news.summary: Starting on December 9, 2024, Rent the Runway (RTR), listed on the NASDAQ as RENT, has initiated a collaboration with a holiday-themed campaign featuring America's Sweethearts. RTR is renowned for revolutionizing the way women access clothing through its innovative concept known as Closet in the Cloud. Stay tuned for updates on this exciting partnership.

news.headline: Lucid Group, maker of advanced electric vehicles, to attend Nasdaq 51st Investor Conference with Morgan Stanley.
news.summary: In Newark, California on December 9, 2024, Lucid Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: LCID), known for producing highly advanced electric vehicles, revealed their involvement in a fireside discussion at the Nasdaq 51st Investor Conference, organized in collaboration with Morgan Stanley.

news.headline: SmarterDx named a winner in Modern Healthcare's Best in Business program's inaugural year. Dec 9, 2024. #AI #Healthcare
news.summary: SmarterDx has been recognized in the Newcomer - Startups category in the program's first year. The company, based in New York, was honored by Modern Healthcare on December 9, 2024. SmarterDx is a prominent player in clinical AI, focusing on revenue integrity and care quality. They were selected as one of Modern Healthcare's Best in Business for 2024.

news.headline: Digital creators generate $368 billion globally, with $29 billion impact in the U.S. - transforming culture and economy.
news.summary: A recently released report reveals that creators worldwide have generated a remarkable $368 billion in estimated revenue across 20 countries. The United States alone saw an estimated economic impact of $29 billion. The report, conducted through a comprehensive survey, showcases the significant financial contributions of creators to various economies. The findings signify the substantial influence and economic value that creators bring to the global market.

news.headline: Global Gaming Women appoints Pamela Buckley as Executive Vice President to enhance mission programming.
news.summary: A charitable organization in the gaming industry has recently appointed Pamela Buckley as its Executive Vice President to strengthen mission-focused programs. Global Gaming Women (GGW) is based in Las Vegas and made this decision on December 9, 2024. This move aims to bolster administrative leadership and enhance their overall impact.

news.headline: Woolsey Pharmaceuticals found that toxic TDP-43 pathology significantly decreased in ALS patients taking BRAVYL®.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in New York, Woolsey Pharmaceuticals revealed progress in developing BRAVYL, an oral fasudil medication targeting Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS). The company disclosed information from a poster presented by Dr. Daniel Linseman's team at the University of Denver.
